title: Meeting Intelligence Hub - Analyses
description: Meeting intelligence records generated by the Meeting Intelligence Hub plugin. Lazy-created on first run of /meeting:intel or /meeting:analyze with --output=notion. Each row represents one analyzed meeting with extracted summaries, decisions, follow-ups, and topic tags.

Meeting Title.description: Meeting name — primary lookup key and page title.

Date.description: Meeting date extracted from transcript metadata or filename.

Source Path.description: File path or Notion URL where the original transcript was found.

Summary.description: 3-5 sentence meeting summary covering main topics, key participants, and outcomes.

Decisions.description: Formatted list of key decisions made during the meeting with proposer and context.

Follow-Ups.description: Extracted commitments: who owes what by when. Format compatible with #06 Follow-Up Tracker.

Topics.description: 3-7 extracted topic tags from noun phrase analysis and frequency.

Duration.description: Meeting length if available from transcript metadata.

Transcript File.description: Path to saved normalized transcript file in transcripts/ directory.

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the analysis was generated.

notes: Commands search for this database by name ('Meeting Intelligence Hub - Analyses') before creating it. Lazy-created on first use. Idempotent by Meeting Title + Date — duplicate entries are updated, not duplicated.
